prompt: When a Google Form is submitted, append the response data to a Google Sheet
When a Google Form is submitted, save the response to a Google Sheet and send a Slack notification with the submitter's name
notes: Linear 3-node chain. Tests basic variable passing.

prompt: Fetch the top 10 rows from a Google Sheet, summarise them using AI, then send the summary as an email
notes: Tests AI node in linear chain with variable handoff

prompt: When a webhook fires, extract the payload data, transform it using a code snippet, and save the result to Google Sheets
notes: Tests CODE sandbox node in linear chain

prompt: Every day at 9am, read the latest entries from Google Sheets and post a summary to a Discord channel
When a Stripe payment is received, if the payment amount is greater than $100 send a Slack alert to #sales, otherwise just log it to a Google Sheet
notes: Classic IF branch with two output paths. Tests branch routing.

prompt: When a Google Form is submitted, use AI to classify the response as positive or negative sentiment, then if positive send a thank-you Gmail, if negative create a Slack alert for the support team
notes: AI node feeding branch. Tests AI output as branch condition.

prompt: Fetch all rows from Google Sheets where status is pending, loop through each one, and for each row send a reminder Gmail to the email address in that row
notes: Tests FILTER + LOOP combination with variable iteration

prompt: When a webhook fires with a user ID, fetch their record from Google Sheets, use AI to generate a personalised message, then send it via Gmail and log the outcome to Slack
notes: 5-node linear chain with AI. Tests deep variable chaining.

prompt: Every Monday morning, check Google Sheets for overdue tasks, if there are any send a Slack summary to #team, if there are none send a celebration message to #general
notes: Two Slack nodes on different branches — tests duplicate node type handling

prompt: When a Google Form is submitted, use AI to extract key entities from the response, classify the request type, if it's a support request fetch the customer record from Sheets and use AI to draft a reply then send via Gmail and log to Slack, if it's a sales enquiry send to a different Slack channel and create a Sheet entry
notes: Complex multi-branch with two AI nodes in separate paths

prompt: Every night, fetch all new Google Drive files added today, for each file use AI to extract and summarise the content, classify it as urgent or routine, if urgent send a Slack DM to the team lead and add a Sheet entry with high priority flag, if routine just append to a running Sheet log
notes: LOOP + IF + AI combination — highest complexity pattern

prompt: When a Stripe payment event fires, fetch the customer details from Google Sheets using the customer ID from the payment, use a code block to compute their lifetime value, if lifetime value exceeds $1000 use AI to write a VIP thank-you email and send via Gmail and post to Slack #vip-customers, if below $1000 just send a standard confirmation Gmail
notes: CODE + IF + conditional AI node — tests numeric condition branching

prompt: For each row in a Google Sheet, use AI to rewrite the content field in a formal tone, update the row in place with the rewritten content, and if the AI confidence is low flag it in a separate audit Sheet
notes: Loop with in-body branching off AI output — tests nested DAG structure

prompt: When a webhook fires with an array of customer IDs, loop through each ID, fetch their profile from Google Sheets, use AI to score their churn risk from 0 to 10, if risk score is above 7 send a Slack alert to #retention and Gmail to their account manager, collect all scores and at the end append a summary row to a reporting Sheet
notes: Full pipeline: loop + AI scoring + conditional alerts + aggregate result — most complex pattern in dataset
